stories.title: FIA Sporting Regulations Meeting Today — Countdown to April 20 Vote (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The FIA is meeting TODAY on 2026 F1 sporting regulations.

April 15 → Sporting regs.
April 16 → Technical follow-up.
April 20 → High-level vote with all teams.

5 days until F1's biggest regulatory decision since 2022. #F1Fanrecap #Formula1 #F1

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The energy recovery debate in F1 right now:

Currently: 9 MJ per lap in qualifying
Suzuka: cut to 8 MJ at the last minute
Under discussion: as low as 6 MJ

That would be a 33% cut. The April 20 vote decides everything. #F1Fanrecap #Formula1 #F1

article.headline: FIA Meets Today as Formula 1's Most Critical Regulatory Week Builds to April 20 Vote

stories.title: Verstappen's Nordschleife Redemption — 24H Qualifiers Start This Weekend (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Max Verstappen won the NLS2 at the Nürburgring this year.

Then his team was disqualified for a tyre infringement.

This weekend: he's back at the Nordschleife for the 24H Qualifiers — two 4-hour races, April 18-19. #F1Fanrecap #Nurburgring #Verstappen

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
25.378km. The most demanding circuit on Earth.

Max Verstappen returns to the Nürburgring this weekend — April 18 & 19 — with Lucas Auer as co-driver.

Two four-hour races. Redemption mission. No F1 pressure. This is the Verstappen we don't often see. #F1Fanrecap #Nurburgring

article.headline: Verstappen Returns to the Nordschleife This Weekend — Redemption and Preparation at the 24H Qualifiers

stories.title: Ferrari's Monza Filming Day — Hamilton and Leclerc Test Miami Aero Package (NEW STORY)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Ferrari has confirmed a filming day at Monza on April 22.

Both Hamilton AND Leclerc will drive.

The package: a revised floor built for Bahrain (then cancelled) and halo wing components. Miami target: close the 45-point gap to Mercedes. #F1Fanrecap #Ferrari #Formula1

article.headline: Ferrari Heads to Monza Next Week — Hamilton and Leclerc to Test Miami Aero Package

stories.title: Red Bull's Miami "Second Season Launch" — RB22 Overhaul Incoming (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Red Bull team principal Laurent Mekies is calling Miami a "second season launch."

That's the level of upgrade they're bringing.

Verstappen has a P6, a DNF, and a P8 from 3 races. The RB22 is ~1 second off Mercedes' pace. Something has to change. #F1Fanrecap #RedBull #Formula1

article.headline: Red Bull's "Second Season Launch": Inside the Miami Overhaul That Must Rescue Verstappen's 2026

stories.title: 2026 F1 Championship Check — Antonelli Leads April Break at Record-Young 19 (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
2026 F1 Championship at the April break midpoint:

🏁 Antonelli — 72 pts (youngest leader in F1 history)
🏁 Russell — 63 pts
🏁 Leclerc — 49 pts
🏁 Hamilton — 41 pts

Mercedes leads constructors by 45 pts. Miami May 3. #F1Fanrecap #Formula1 #F1

article.headline: Where the 2026 F1 Championship Stands at the April Break Midpoint — Antonelli's Historic Lead
